rationale: Educ. Code §38.352 addresses school district immunity from liability and is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote:
This subchapter does not:
(1) waive any immunity from liability of a school district or of district school officers or employees;
_note: Rule text concerns civil liability immunity for school districts; no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
